our_ammo.title: Coupling as Temporal Reversal: The Structural Condition for Reverse Time

our_ammo.title: The Second Law Is Statistical, Not Structural: Local Temporal Reversal Through Coupling Convergence
our_ammo.angle: Second Law is statistical, not structural. In small strongly-coupled systems, entropy CAN decrease. Coupling convergence = local reverse time. Three experimental signatures.
